name: Sweet Onion Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
3. In a sauté pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat until hot.
4. Caramelize the onions for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they are golden brown and caramelized.
5. In an electric mixer with a whisk attachment, whip the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Switch to a paddle attachment and cream the butter and sugar together in the mixer until light and fluffy.
7. Add the egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each yolk.
8. With the machine running, add the apple juice and ginger, mixing until combined.
9. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper.
10. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk to the butter mixture with the mixer on low speed, starting and ending with the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined; do not over mix.
11. Fold in the stiff egg whites.
12. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
13. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
14. Remove the pan from the oven and invert onto a wire rack. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
15. Slice a couple of slices from the loaf and place the loaf and slices on a plate.
Yield: 1 loaf
